title: athyrium pinnatum
intro: Athyrium pinnatum, also known as the Lady's fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its delicate fronds and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Athyrium pinnatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
